title: App API Endpoint Inventory for Cloudflare Security Monitoring
description:
Perform a full inventory of all API endpoints used by the DataTools Pro application. The inventory will be provided to Cloudflare to enable endpoint monitoring for malicious activity detection and automatic blocking.

### Identified Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint |
|--------|----------|
| GET | /api/metrics |
| GET | /api/metrics/{id} |
| POST | /api/metrics/upsert |
| POST | /api/dtpsignup |
| POST | /api/metrics/addUsers |
| POST | /api/metrics/removeUsers |

The schema and endpoint list need to be added to Cloudflare for automated security monitoring. Salesforce API endpoints may also need to be included.
acceptance_criteria: All DataTools Pro API endpoints are documented with HTTP method and path
Endpoint list is formatted and submitted to Cloudflare for monitoring
Cloudflare API schema discovery is configured for the listed endpoints
Salesforce API endpoints are evaluated for inclusion
api_changes: Documents existing endpoints: GET /api/metrics, GET /api/metrics/{id}, POST /api/metrics/upsert, POST /api/dtpsignup, POST /api/metrics/addUsers, POST /api/metrics/removeUsers.
implementation_notes: Endpoint inventory compiled by development team. Links need to be added to Cloudflare for API schema discovery and malicious activity monitoring.
comment_summary: Waqar compiled the list of six API endpoints and asked whether Salesforce endpoints should also be included. The endpoint list was shared for addition to Cloudflare.
